name: Hawaii Nature Center
tagline: Interactive nature education in Makiki Valley — guided rainforest walks, bug hunts, and Hawaiian ecology for curious kids and adults.
parking: Limited lot on Makiki Heights Dr
hours: Daily 8am-4pm; guided programs at set times
bestTime: Morning guided programs; weekdays are less busy
talkStory: Founded in 1981 as a nonprofit in Makiki Valley, the center sits in the same forest where Hawaiian royalty once maintained a retreat. The guided rainforest walks pass native plants used in traditional Hawaiian medicine, and weekend bug hunts let kids explore with magnifying glasses. Local families have been bringing their children here for over 40 years -- many current volunteers first visited as elementary school students on field trips.
